body: Today 'gittoc update -l a,b' supports comma-separated labels via parse_labels(), but 'gittoc new -l a,b' passes raw args through and stores a single label string 'a,b'. This is surprising and easy to hit. Fix by reusing the same label parsing semantics for new, and update help/docs accordingly so all label-taking commands behave consistently.
title: Make new --label parsing consistent with update
